can_decide_items: minor material substitution and same-day sequence adjustment
cannot_decide_items: major design change or total milestone impact
escalation_trigger: any impact on master milestone or budget redline

can_decide_items: short-term resource reallocation and subcontractor site arrangement
cannot_decide_items: total budget overrun commitment or client claim settlement
escalation_trigger: critical procurement delay over 3 days or cross-site resource conflict

cannot_decide_items: contract scope reset without executive approval
escalation_trigger: any schedule/profit/collection redline or major client complaint
